svg.title: Denmark vs Italy: Institutional and policy timeline 1996–2019
svg.desc: A vertical timeline showing key laws, reforms, and external shocks affecting productivity in Denmark and Italy across four sub-periods from 1996 to 2019.

g.text: Subsidised jobs for reduced capacity workers
New work contracts; limited to small firms
Tripartite body on digital future of work
Compliance burden heavier for small firms
